title: Interactive checklist component with progress tracking and sub-items
purpose: Provides a reusable checklist UI component that tracks completion status of main items and optional sub-items, with visual progress indicators and expandable sections.
module_context: Exports a Checklist React component that accepts items with optional sub-items, handles state management for completion tracking, and provides visual feedback for required items and progress.

steps.content: Normalize the input items to ensure each has a unique identifier.
Initialize state for tracking expanded items, main item completion states, and sub-item completion states.
Define callback functions to toggle item completion and sub-item completion states.
Define a callback function to toggle the expansion state of item sections.
Calculate progress metrics including total items, completed items, and required items.
Render the progress section with visual indicators and required item tracking.
Render the list of main items with their associated sub-items in expandable sections.
Map the input items array to ensure each item has a unique identifier.
Assign a default identifier to items that do not have one.
Update the completion state of the specified item.
Invoke the onItemChange callback with the updated completion status.
Update the completion state of the specified sub-item.
Invoke the onSubItemChange callback with the updated completion status.
Toggle the expansion state of the specified item section.
Update the set of expanded items accordingly.
Calculate the percentage of completed items relative to total items.
Determine if all required items have been completed.
